reports.name: Inwarded Raw Material after Inspection
reports.queryTemplate:
select RI_DATE as GrnDate, RI_REPORTNO as GrnNumber, RD_BATCHNO as BatchNo, MM_RawMtPartNo as RawMaterial, MT_Name as MaterialType, RD_ACCEPTEDQTY as Quantity, ss_Name as Supplier
 from rm_inwarddetails left join rm_inwardmaster on RI_ID = RD_RIID
 left join materialmaster on RD_RMID = MM_Id
 left join supplier on RI_SUPPLIERID = ss_Id
 left join materialtypemaster on MM_mtId=mt_id
 where month(RI_DATE) = {month} and year(RI_DATE) = {year} and RI_REPORTNO like 'INV%' and RI_INSPECTIONYN = 'Y';

reports.name: Current Raw Material Stock
reports.queryTemplate:
select * from (SELECT RD_BATCHNO as 'Batch No',
		MM_RawMtPartNo as 'Raw Material',
        MT_Name as 'Material Type',
		round(SUM(CASE WHEN ri_movement = 'I' THEN rd_qty ELSE 0 END)
			- SUM(CASE WHEN ri_movement = 'O' THEN rd_qty ELSE 0 END) )AS Qty
	FROM rm_inwarddetails , rm_inwardmaster, materialmaster, materialtypemaster
    where rd_riid=ri_id and RD_RMID = MM_Id and MM_mtId = MT_Id
    group by RD_BATCHNO, RD_RMID order by Qty)t where Qty != 0;

reports.name: Monthly Material Movement
reports.queryTemplate:
SELECT RI_DATE as 'Date', US_FirstName as 'User', RD_BATCHNO as 'Batch No', MM_RawMtPartNo as 'Raw Material', CO_PARTNO as 'Part No', RD_QTY 'Qty', 
CASE when RI_MOVEMENT = 'I' then 'Inward' else 'Outward' end as Movement, ML_DESCRIPTION as 'Purpose', 
CASE when RI_SUPPLIERID = 0 then 'In House' else ss_Name end as Supplier FROM 
rm_inwardmaster 
left join supplier on RI_SUPPLIERID = ss_Id, rm_inwarddetails 
left join components on RD_COMPID = CO_ID
left join materialmaster on RD_RMID = MM_Id
, rm_movements , users
where RI_ID = RD_RIID and RI_MOVEMENTTYPE = ML_ID and RI_CREATEDBY = US_ID and
 month(RI_DATE) = {month} and year(RI_DATE) = {year}
order by RD_RMID, RD_BATCHNO, RI_DATE;

reports.name: List of Distinct Raw Materials
reports.queryTemplate:
select MM_RawMtPartNo as RawMaterial ,MT_Name as Material ,MM_Thickness as Thickness ,MM_StripWidth as Width,hm_name as Hardness,GM_Name as Grade from materialmaster
	left join grademaster on MM_gmId=gm_id
	left join hardnessmaster on MM_hmId=HM_Id
	left join materialtypemaster on MM_mtId=mt_id where mm_activeyn='Y';

reports.name: Machines
reports.queryTemplate: SELECT MCM_Name as Machine, MCM_Make as Make, MCM_Capacity as Capacity FROM machinemaster where MCM_ACTIVEYN = 'Y';

reports.name: Suppliers
reports.queryTemplate: select ss_name Supplier,st_name Type from supplier left join suppliertype on ss_SupplierType= st_id where ss_activeyn='Y';

reports.name: Users
reports.queryTemplate: SELECT US_FirstName as 'First Name', US_LastName as 'Last Name', US_Login as Login, US_EmpID as 'Emp Id' FROM users where US_CurrentYn = 'Y';

reports.name: Distinct Parts
reports.queryTemplate:
select cu_name as 'Parent Customer', CO_PARTNO as 'Part No', CO_PARTNAME as 'Part Name', mt_name as 'Material', CO_WEIGHT as Weight, CO_WIDTH as Width, CO_LENGTH as Length, CO_REVISION as Revision, gm_name as Grade ,pl_name as Plating ,ft_name as 'Finish Type', CO_MICRON as Micron from components c
	left join customer on CO_CUSTID=cu_id
    left join materialtypemaster on co_materialtypeid= mt_id
    left join grademaster on CO_GRADEID=gm_id
    left join plating on CO_ELECTROPLATING=pl_id
    left join finishtype on CO_FINISH=ft_id
    where co_id in (select distinct(CO_PARENTID) from components where CO_ACTIVEYN= 'Y' );

reports.name: Tools
reports.queryTemplate:
select CT_TOOLNO as 'Tool No', co_partno as 'Part No', CO_PARTNAME as 'Part Name', MM_RawMtPartNo as 'Raw Material', CT_PITCH as Pitch, CT_NO_OF_CAVITY as Cavity from components_tool ct
	 left join components on CT_COMPID=CO_ID
     left join materialmaster on CT_RMID=mm_id    
     left join controlprocess on ct_cpid = cp_id
    where CT_ACTIVEYN='Y';

reports.name: Customers
reports.queryTemplate: select CU_Name as Customer from customer where CU_Status = 'R';

reports.name: Customer Part Tools
reports.queryTemplate:
select cu_name as Customer ,co_partno as 'Part No', CO_PARTNAME as 'Part Name' , t.tool_list as 'Tool No'
from  components
 left join customer on cu_status ='R' and CO_CUSTID= cu_id
left join ( select CT_COMPID, count(ct_toolno) tcount,GROUP_CONCAT(ct_toolno ORDER BY ct_toolno SEPARATOR '::') AS tool_list,
GROUP_CONCAT(ct_id ORDER BY ct_id SEPARATOR '::') AS toolid_list
 from components_tool where ct_activeyn='Y' group by CT_COMPID order by CT_COMPID) t on  t.ct_compid = CO_PARENTID
where CO_ACTIVEYN='Y'
 order by cu_name,cu_id;

reports.name: Monthly Order
reports.queryTemplate:
SELECT
  t.partno    AS 'Part No',
  t.total_qty AS 'Total Qty',
  t.day_1     AS 'day 1',
  t.day_2     AS 'day 2',
  t.day_3     AS 'day 3',
  t.day_4     AS 'day 4',
  t.day_5     AS 'day 5',
  t.day_6     AS 'day 6',
  t.day_7     AS 'day 7',
  t.day_8     AS 'day 8',
  t.day_9     AS 'day 9',
  t.day_10    AS 'day 10',
  t.day_11    AS 'day 11',
  t.day_12    AS 'day 12',
  t.day_13    AS 'day 13',
  t.day_14    AS 'day 14',
  t.day_15    AS 'day 15',
  t.day_16    AS 'day 16',
  t.day_17    AS 'day 17',
  t.day_18    AS 'day 18',
  t.day_19    AS 'day 19',
  t.day_20    AS 'day 20',
  t.day_21    AS 'day 21',
  t.day_22    AS 'day 22',
  t.day_23    AS 'day 23',
  t.day_24    AS 'day 24',
  t.day_25    AS 'day 25',
  t.day_26    AS 'day 26',
  t.day_27    AS 'day 27',
  t.day_28    AS 'day 28',
  t.day_29    AS 'day 29',
  t.day_30    AS 'day 30',
  t.day_31    AS 'day 31'
FROM (
  SELECT
    0 AS sort_order,
    'Grand Total' AS partno,
    SUM(sc.CS_QTY) AS total_qty,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 1 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 2 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 3 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 4 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 5 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 6 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_6,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 7 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_7,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 8 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_8,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 9 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_9,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 10 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_10,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 11 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_11,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 12 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_12,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 13 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_13,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 14 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_14,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 15 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_15,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 16 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_16,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 17 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_17,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 18 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_18,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 19 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_19,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 20 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_20,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 21 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_21,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 22 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_22,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 23 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 24 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_24,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 25 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_25,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 26 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_26,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 27 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_27,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 28 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_28,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 29 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_29,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 30 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_30,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 31 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_31
  FROM schedule_master sm
  JOIN schedule_details sd ON sm.SM_ID = sd.SC_SMID
  JOIN scheduled_customer sc ON sd.SC_ID = sc.CS_SCID
  JOIN components c ON sd.SC_COMPID = c.CO_ID
  WHERE sm.SM_MONTH = {month}
    AND sm.SM_YEAR = {year}
    AND sc.CS_SCHEDULESTATE IN (1, 2)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    1 AS sort_order,
    c.CO_PARTNO AS partno,
    SUM(sc.CS_QTY) AS total_qty,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 1 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 2 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 3 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 4 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 5 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 6 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_6,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 7 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_7,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 8 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_8,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 9 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_9,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 10 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_10,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 11 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_11,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 12 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_12,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 13 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_13,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 14 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_14,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 15 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_15,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 16 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_16,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 17 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_17,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 18 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_18,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 19 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_19,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 20 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_20,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 21 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_21,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 22 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_22,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 23 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_23,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 24 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_24,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 25 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_25,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 26 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_26,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 27 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_27,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 28 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_28,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 29 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_29,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 30 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_30,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(sc.CS_DATE) = 31 THEN sc.CS_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS day_31
  FROM schedule_master sm
  JOIN schedule_details sd ON sm.SM_ID = sd.SC_SMID
  JOIN scheduled_customer sc ON sd.SC_ID = sc.CS_SCID
  JOIN components c ON sd.SC_COMPID = c.CO_ID
  WHERE sm.SM_MONTH = {month}
    AND sm.SM_YEAR = {year}
    AND sc.CS_SCHEDULESTATE IN (1, 2)
  GROUP BY c.CO_PARTNO
) t
ORDER BY t.sort_order, t.partno;

reports.name: Monthly Production
reports.queryTemplate:
select date(pd_date) 'Prod Date', CO_PARTNO 'Part No',MCM_Name Machine, CT_TOOLNO Tool, MM_RawMtPartNo 'Raw MAterial',
pd_batchno 'BAtch No', pd_prodqty  'No Of Comp', PD_SFREJECT 'SF Rej',PD_SWQTY 'SU Wastage',PD_SCRAPQTY 'Scrap',PD_QTYKG 'RawMaterial(Kg)', pd_prodqty/conVal 'Theo RM Kg'
from production_details 
left join machinemaster on MCM_Id= PD_MCID
left join materialmaster on mm_id = pd_rmid
left join components_tool on ct_id =pd_toolid
left join scheduled_production on pd_psid= ps_id
left join components on PS_PARENTCOMPID = CO_ID
left join (
SELECT CT_ID AS ctid,
        ((1 / ((MT_Density * MM_Thickness) * MM_StripWidth)) * ((1000 * CT_NO_OF_CAVITY) / CT_Pitch)) AS conVal
      FROM components_tool
      INNER JOIN materialmaster ON CT_RMID = MM_Id
      INNER JOIN materialtypemaster ON MM_MTID = MT_Id
      WHERE CT_ActiveYN = 'Y' AND CT_PITCH > 0 AND CT_NO_OF_CAVITY > 0) toolConv on ctid = ct_id 
where month(pd_date)= {month} and year(pd_date) = {year}
order by pd_date

reports.name: Monthly - Component Production
reports.queryTemplate:
select  CO_PARTNO 'Part No', MM_RawMtPartNo 'Raw MAterial',
 sum(pd_prodqty)  'No Of Comp', sum(PD_SFREJECT) 'SF Rej',sum(PD_SWQTY) 'SU Wastage',round(sum(PD_SCRAPQTY),2) 'Scrap',round(sum(PD_QTYKG),2) 'RawMaterial(Kg)', round(sum(pd_prodqty/conVal),2) 'Theo RM Kg'
from production_details 
left join materialmaster on mm_id = pd_rmid
left join scheduled_production on pd_psid= ps_id
left join components on PS_PARENTCOMPID = CO_ID
left join components_tool on PD_TOOLID = ct_id
left join (
SELECT CT_ID AS ctid,
        ((1 / ((MT_Density * MM_Thickness) * MM_StripWidth)) * ((1000 * CT_NO_OF_CAVITY) / CT_Pitch)) AS conVal
      FROM components_tool
      INNER JOIN materialmaster ON CT_RMID = MM_Id
      INNER JOIN materialtypemaster ON MM_MTID = MT_Id
      WHERE CT_ActiveYN = 'Y' AND CT_PITCH > 0 AND CT_NO_OF_CAVITY > 0) toolConv on ctid = ct_id 
where month(pd_date)= {month} and year(pd_date) = {year}
group by CO_PARTNO,MM_RawMtPartNo
order by  CO_PARTNO;

reports.name: Schedule Vs Produced - Monthly
Distinct Tools with PartNos
reports.queryTemplate:
SELECT 
    ct_toolno AS Tool,
    COUNT(*) AS 'Component Count',
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN CO_PARTNO END), '') AS Component1,
		COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN CO_PARTNO END), '') AS Component2,
		COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN CO_PARTNO END), '') AS Component3,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 4 THEN CO_PARTNO END), '') AS Component4
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ct_toolno,
        CO_PARTNO,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ct_toolno ORDER BY CO_PARTNO) AS rn
    FROM components_tool 
    LEFT JOIN components ON CT_COMPID = CO_ID
    WHERE ct_activeyn = 'Y'
) t
GROUP BY ct_toolno
ORDER BY ct_toolno;
